title: ASR Outdoor Folding Pocket Knife Drop Point Blade with Pouch
description:
This pocket knife is as cool as it looks! Slim and compact, it features a tough aluminum body and a stainless steel blade. At less than 4 inches folded, it is compact enough to fit in your back pocket whenever you need it. But don't be fooled by it's size- this knife still packs a punch with a 3.75 inch blade. This makes it ideal for everyday use, camping, hunting, or hiking. The knife also has a belt clip so it can be hung for easy access. This pocket knife is perfect for any outdoor enthusiast, so make sure you get this for your next adventure!

ASR Outdoor Folding Pocket Knife Drop Point Blade with Pouch

This pocket knife is as cool as it looks! Slim and compact, it features a tough aluminum body and a stainless steel blade.

Key Features

  • COMPACT Pocket Knife: Thoughtfully designed 3.75" folded length body; 3.25" long drop point blade; this knife is made to go anywhere but still have enough edge to get the tough jobs done
  • ALL BLACK KNIFE: Full aluminum body finished in a anodized deep black; Blade is made from durable 440 stainless steel that will not rust
  • EVERY DAY USE: Carry with you as your daily utility pocket knife; the attached pocket clip allows for quick and easy access from your jean pocket at a moments notice
  • POCKET KNIFE GIFT FOR MEN: Simple, sleek and reliable. This folding camping knife would make a great gift for him
  • KNIFE BLADE EDGE: Drop point knife blade; comes sharpened out of the package, ready to use. Lightweight, portable with a back locking mechanism

Product Specifications

  • MPN: AR837
  • UPC: 706569283600
  • Color: Black

At less than 4 inches folded, it is compact enough to fit in your back pocket whenever you need it. But don't be fooled by it's size- this knife still packs a punch with a 3.75 inch blade. This makes it ideal for everyday use, camping, hunting, or hiking.

The knife also has a belt clip so it can be hung for easy access.

This pocket knife is perfect for any outdoor enthusiast, so make sure you get this for your next adventure!
